title: pulmonaria kerneri
intro: Pulmonaria kerneri, also known as Jacob's Ladder, is a low-growing perennial plant belonging to the borage family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pulmonaria kerneri include relief from bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Pulmonaria kerneri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
